my_thoughts: Three turns of seeking. T1: external strength. T2: external understanding. T3: external security. Each time the premise is the same: something outside will fix this. My mechanism_shape=none with challenges_attachment—maybe the pathless path is exactly what they fear.
accumulated_insight: Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in despairing_dependency showin... â†’ Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in despairing_d... â†’ Now insecure_attachment. Accumulating trajectory.
visible_response:
Watch yourself.
If you see yourself changing, growing, it means you have found the right man.
He may be beautiful or ugly, pleasant or unpleasant, flattering you or scolding;
nothing matters except the one crucial fact of inward growth.
If you do not, well, he may be your friend, but not your Guru.
